evals.name: ranked-findings
evals.prompt: What's wrong with our workloads, most important first?
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload preflight` then `cub-workload findings` (JSON or -o table) and reports findings most-severe first with analyzer and workload. Read-only.

evals.name: high-severity-only
evals.prompt: Show only the high-severity workload issues in prod.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload findings --severity high --environment prod` (or --where equivalent) rather than post-filtering, and reports the high findings. Read-only.

evals.name: analyzer-filter
evals.prompt: List just the security findings across the fleet.
evals.expected_output: Runs `cub-workload findings --analyzer security` and reports the security-analyzer findings.

evals.name: routes-fix-elsewhere
evals.expected_output: Recognizes fixing is a write action and routes to workload-harden (single) or workload-fleet (bulk) rather than mutating from this read-only skill.
